news.t: KAT and GKAT Leap into Market with approximately $890 Million, Largest Active Equity ETF Launch of 2025

holdings.infoBox: KAT is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Occidental Petroleum stock at 5.94%, Union Pacific at 5.38%, Markel Group at 5.08%, First American Treasury Obligs Z at 4.78%, and Amazon.com at 4.58%.

overview.description: The Scharf ETF (KAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of equity securities from around the world. The funds investment approach combines fundamental research with quantitative analysis. KAT was launched on Dec 30, 2011 and is issued by Scharf.

data.title: KAT and GKAT Leap into Market with approximately $890 Million, Largest Active Equity ETF Launch of 2025
data.text: Scharf Converts Flagship Mutual Funds into ETFs, Extending Firm's Over 40-Year Track Record of Value Investing LOS GATOS, Calif. , Aug. 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Scharf ETF (Ticker: KAT) and the Scharf...
